description: Manually curated compatibility database for the New Customer Accounts migration audit. Status values: compatible | incompatible | partial | unknown. This database is the primary ongoing maintenance cost of this product. Statuses must be verified against each app vendor's official documentation or support response.

apps.name: LoyaltyLion
apps.summary: LoyaltyLion embeds a loyalty widget directly into the classic account page template. A dedicated widget insertion method for New Customer Accounts was released but requires reconfiguration.
apps.notes: Requires switching from Liquid snippet embed to LoyaltyLion's New Customer Accounts widget method. Check LoyaltyLion's migration guide before switching.

apps.name: Smile: Loyalty & Rewards
apps.summary: Smile.io has released a New Customer Accounts compatible launcher but the classic Liquid embed on the account page template must be removed. The Smile launcher widget now loads via script tag.
apps.notes: Remove classic Liquid account page snippet. Install the Smile NCA launcher. Refer to Smile's official NCA migration documentation.

apps.name: Yotpo Loyalty & Referrals
apps.summary: Yotpo Loyalty & Referrals has a customer account panel that historically required classic account page Liquid integration. NCA-compatible version available.
apps.notes: Contact Yotpo support to confirm which panel version you are on and obtain NCA migration instructions.

apps.name: Growave
apps.summary: Growave bundles loyalty, wishlist, and reviews with deep classic account page integration. NCA compatibility depends on which features are active and which Growave plan is used.
apps.notes: Growave account page widget requires manual migration. Contact Growave support for NCA migration instructions specific to your plan.

apps.name: Wishlist Plus
apps.summary: Wishlist Plus injects a wishlist button and account page widget that relies on classic account page Liquid. An NCA-compatible embed method has been released.
apps.notes: Replace classic Liquid embed with Swym NCA widget. Refer to Swym's New Customer Accounts migration documentation.

apps.name: Recharge Subscriptions
apps.summary: ReCharge has a customer portal that historically relied on /account routing from the classic customer accounts system. Current versions use a standalone portal URL, but some merchant configurations still embed into the classic account page.
apps.notes: Verify your ReCharge portal is using the standalone URL (not the Liquid-embedded version). Update any account page Liquid that links to the ReCharge portal using classic routes.

apps.name: Bold Subscriptions
apps.summary: Bold Subscriptions V2 uses a hosted customer portal but Classic may be embedded via the account page Liquid. Check which version is installed.
apps.notes: Verify whether your Bold portal uses the standalone URL or is embedded in the classic account page. Coordinate migration with Bold Commerce support.

apps.name: PayWhirl Recurring Payments
apps.summary: PayWhirl embeds a subscription management widget into the classic customer account page. NCA compatibility requires using PayWhirl's hosted portal instead.
apps.notes: Switch from classic account page embed to PayWhirl hosted portal URL. Update any links to the customer subscription page in theme files.

apps.name: Stamped.io
apps.summary: Stamped embeds a loyalty/rewards tab into the classic account page. This integration is affected by the NCA migration.
apps.notes: Check if the Stamped account page Loyalty/Rewards widget is installed. Stamped has released NCA migration guidance; consult their support team.

apps.name: Klaviyo
apps.summary: Klaviyo operates primarily via backend webhooks and email flows. Account page identification scripts may need updating but core flows are not broken by NCA.
apps.notes: If Klaviyo identify scripts are embedded in account page Liquid templates, verify they function with New Customer Accounts. Backend flows are unaffected.

apps.name: Omnisend
apps.summary: Omnisend operates via webhooks and customer event tracking. Not dependent on classic account page Liquid.
apps.notes: Core functionality unaffected. Verify any custom Omnisend tracking snippets embedded in account templates.

apps.name: Gorgias
apps.summary: Gorgias is a helpdesk app that embeds via chat widget, not the account page. Not affected by NCA migration.
apps.notes: No action required for Gorgias itself. If Gorgias tracking is embedded in account page templates, verify functionality.

apps.name: Judge.me Product Reviews
apps.summary: Judge.me reviews load via product pages and email. Not dependent on classic customer account page structure.
apps.notes: No account page dependency found. Core review functionality unaffected.

apps.name: Okendo
apps.summary: Okendo reviews are product-centric and do not depend on classic account page Liquid.
apps.notes: No action required for core review functionality. Verify any account page loyalty or profile widgets if Okendo Plus features are enabled.

apps.name: Yotpo Product Reviews
apps.summary: Yotpo product review widgets are product-page centric. Core review functionality is not blocked by NCA migration.
apps.notes: Verify separately if Yotpo Loyalty & Referrals is also installed, which has a separate partial compatibility status.

apps.name: Loox
apps.summary: Loox photo reviews are product-centric. Not dependent on classic customer account page.
apps.notes: No action required. Core functionality unaffected.

apps.name: Back in Stock
apps.summary: Back in Stock alerts use customer email collection and webhooks, not the classic account page.
apps.notes: Verify any account page wishlist or save-for-later integrations separately.

apps.name: Weglot
apps.summary: Weglot translates pages including account pages. NCA account pages are rendered by Shopify's hosted system, which Weglot has limited control over.
apps.notes: NCA login, register, and account pages hosted by Shopify cannot be translated by Weglot in the same way as classic Liquid templates. Verify with Weglot support.

apps.name: Langify
apps.summary: Langify translates Liquid templates including account pages. NCA replaces classic account Liquid templates with Shopify-hosted pages.
apps.notes: Classic account page Liquid translations will no longer apply after NCA migration. Check Langify support for NCA compatibility.

apps.name: Transcy
apps.summary: Translation apps that apply to Liquid templates may be affected by the removal of classic account page Liquid files.
apps.notes: Verify with Transcy support whether NCA-hosted account pages can be translated.

apps.name: Lucky Orange
apps.summary: Lucky Orange injects session recording scripts that may include the classic /account and /login pages. NCA pages are hosted by Shopify and Lucky Orange may not be able to record them.
apps.notes: NCA-hosted login, register, and account pages are not standard Liquid templates. Lucky Orange recordings on these pages may be unavailable after migration.

apps.name: Hotjar
apps.summary: Hotjar heatmap and session recording scripts injected on /account pages will not apply to NCA-hosted pages.
apps.notes: Session recordings on NCA account pages are not available. Adjust tracking expectations accordingly.

apps.name: Privy
apps.summary: Privy popups and email marketing are not dependent on classic account page Liquid templates.
apps.notes: No action required. Core functionality unaffected.

apps.name: Postscript
apps.summary: Postscript SMS marketing operates via webhooks and subscriber collection. Not dependent on classic account page.
apps.notes: No action required. Core functionality unaffected.

apps.name: Attentive
apps.summary: Attentive SMS operates via webhooks and subscriber forms. Not dependent on classic account page.
apps.notes: No action required. Core functionality unaffected.

apps.name: Zendesk
apps.summary: Zendesk chat widget loads globally and is not account page dependent.
apps.notes: No action required. Core functionality unaffected.

apps.name: Social Login
apps.summary: Classic social login apps inject into the /account/login Liquid template. This template is removed by New Customer Accounts.
apps.notes: Classic social login Liquid integrations stop working after NCA migration. Shopify Plus merchants can use Multipass with NCA for custom SSO. Non-Plus merchants may need to wait for Shopify's native social login support or find an NCA-compatible alternative.

apps.name: One Click Social Login
apps.summary: Social login apps that modify the classic /account/login Liquid template are incompatible with New Customer Accounts.
apps.notes: The classic login Liquid template is removed in NCA. Social login integrations that depend on it will stop functioning.

apps.name: MultiSafepay
apps.summary: Payment apps that do not touch account pages are typically unaffected. Verify if any account page integration is present.
apps.notes: Verify with MultiSafepay documentation whether any account page dependency exists.

apps.name: Bold Loyalty Points
apps.summary: Bold Loyalty embeds a points widget in the classic account page Liquid template.
apps.notes: Bold Loyalty account page widget requires migration. Contact Bold Commerce for NCA migration instructions.

apps.name: Trackify X Facebook Pixel
apps.summary: Trackify injects Facebook Pixel tracking on various pages including /account and order status. NCA-hosted pages may not receive these pixel events.
apps.notes: Pixel events on NCA-hosted account pages require migration to the Web Pixels API. Verify which events are firing on account pages.

apps.name: Triple Whale
apps.summary: Triple Whale's Pixel injects a tracking script that fires on order status and account pages. NCA changes the page structure for these routes.
apps.notes: Verify Triple Whale's NCA compatibility documentation. Order confirmation tracking should be unaffected if using the thank you page extension, but account page tracking may need updating.

apps.name: Infinite Options
apps.summary: Infinite Options applies to product pages only. Not affected by account page migration.
apps.notes: No action required.

apps.name: PageFly
apps.summary: If PageFly has been used to create custom login or account pages, those custom pages are replaced by NCA's hosted system.
apps.notes: Audit whether any PageFly pages are mapped to /account, /login, or /register routes. These custom pages will be bypassed by NCA.

apps.name: Shogun
apps.summary: If Shogun has been used to build custom account, login, or register pages, those pages are bypassed by NCA.
apps.notes: Check whether any Shogun pages are assigned to account-related routes. NCA replaces classic account page routing.

apps.name: Size Chart
apps.summary: Size chart apps apply to product pages. Not affected by account page migration.
apps.notes: No action required.

apps.name: Order Printer Pro
apps.summary: Order Printer Pro generates PDFs from order data via backend processing. Not dependent on classic account page Liquid.
apps.notes: No action required. Core functionality unaffected.

apps.name: AfterShip
apps.summary: AfterShip tracking pages are hosted on AfterShip's platform, not dependent on Shopify's classic account pages.
apps.notes: No action required for core tracking. Verify any account page order tracking widget if installed.

apps.name: PayPal Express Checkout
apps.summary: PayPal Express Checkout has been reported to fail after auto-migration to New Customer Accounts in some configurations. Confirm compatibility before migration.
apps.notes: Documented community report of PayPal Express failing after NCA auto-migration (Shopify Community, Feb 2026). Verify with PayPal/Shopify support before migrating.

apps.name: Bold Custom Pricing
apps.summary: Bold Custom Pricing applies customer-specific pricing. Verify whether any account page tag-based customer group logic is affected by NCA.
apps.notes: NCA changes how customer tags are accessed in Liquid. Verify tag-based pricing group logic still works after migration.
